exercises.title: Learning Rate Search
exercises.description: Implement grid search for optimal learning rate.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

def lr_grid_search(fn, lrs, n_params, iters=50):
    # Your code
    pass

def quadratic(x): return np.sum(x**2)
results = lr_grid_search(quadratic, [0.01, 0.1, 0.5, 1.0], 3)
print(results)

testCases.expected: Lower values for good learning rates

exercises.title: Depth Selection

def find_min_depth(energy_fn, max_depth, target):
    # Your code
    pass

def mock_energy(params, depth): return 1.0 / depth + 0.1*np.random.rand()
depth, energy = find_min_depth(mock_energy, 10, 0.3)
print(f"Depth {depth}, Energy {energy:.4f}")
